slots.name: steps
slots.notes: Array of steps: { step_number, title, description, media? }. 3-4 steps recommended.

slots.name: cta
slots.notes: Optional CTA button below the steps list

layout_variants.name: Interactive UI Step Cards (Mini Popovers & Staggered Reveal)
layout_variants.description: UI Aesthetics: 3-column horizontal card layout. Each card holds animated mini-UI components such as chat boxes, floating avatars, audio waveforms, and buttons. Dotted curving SVG arrows direct data flow between cards. Uses [Heading Font] for headings and large index numbers, and [Body Font] for descriptions. Entrance Animation: Step 1: Main cards fade in and slide up on scroll trigger. Step 2: Renders staggered micro-reveals for inner UI details (avatars, chat bubbles slide up, waveforms scale smoothly from center) with a 50ms stagger. On scroll up: Reverses animation, collapsing details and sliding cards down.

layout_variants.name: Split Accordion with Preview Panel
layout_variants.description: UI Aesthetics: Symmetrical 50/50 split column layout. The left column holds a large preview container showcasing mockups, videos, or 3D animations. The right column displays a vertical step accordion. Active steps illuminate with a soft translucent background (backdrop-blur-md bg-white/5 border-l-2 border-primary) highlighting titles in [Heading Font] and descriptions in [Body Font]. Entrance Animation: Accordion panel slides in from the right, while the left preview panel slides in from the left. On scroll up: Both panels retreat off-screen. Hover/Click: Active step descriptions expand smoothly (height: 0 -> auto) via spring, collapsing inactive items, while the left preview panel crossfades corresponding media files over 300ms.

layout_variants.name: Sinusoidal Spline Path Steps
layout_variants.description: UI Aesthetics: Step cards arranged in a sinusoidal offset rhythm (step 1 down, step 2 up, step 3 down). A glowing, curved neon SVG connector line weaves through the card centers. Faded background index numerals (1, 2, 3) render at ultra-low opacity (0.05). Headings use [Heading Font], descriptions use [Body Font]. Entrance Animation: Cards slide up staggered along the sinusoidal curve. Scroll Trigger: The SVG spline line draws its stroke dynamically (stroke-dashoffset: 100% -> 0%) matching scroll velocity. On scroll up: SVG path retracts and cards fade out.

layout_variants.name: Circular Loop Process (360-degree)
layout_variants.description: UI Aesthetics: Circular closed-loop layout. 4 process steps are arranged symmetrically around a thin, rotating neon radial axis in the center. The center hub hosts rotating SVG icons or 3D objects. Neon arrows run along the circular path directing data flows. Headings and labels use [Heading Font]. Entrance Animation: Center radial scales up from 0.5 to 1.0 via spring, while step cards slide out from the center. Scroll Trigger: Neon arrows draw their strokes sequentially along the path matching scroll. On scroll up: Arrows retract and cards collapse back into center.

layout_variants.name: Horizontal Tab Switcher Preview
layout_variants.description: UI Aesthetics: Horizontal navigation tab bar enclosed in a glassmorphic container (backdrop-blur bg-slate-950/40), with the active tab highlighted in [Heading Font]. The lower preview panel displays large mockups or video animations with soft corners and deep drop shadows. Descriptions use [Body Font]. Entrance Load: Tab bar slides in, and the preview panel scales up from 0.95 to 1.0. On scroll up: Both fade and slide out vertically. Tab Click: Old media slides left and fades, while new media slides in from the right (300ms crossfade slide).

line_reveal_header.intent: Heading and description line-reveal: Step 1: Split text into words and group by browser offsetTop for responsive wraps. Step 2: Apply ScrollTrigger scrub to each text row entering viewport. Step 3: GSAP scrub translates y: 24px -> 0px and fades opacity: 0.1 -> 1.0. On scroll up: Reverses animation to slide down and fade out.

spec.type: gsap ScrollTrigger scrub per offsetTop row

steps.intent: Staggered steps entrance: Step 1: Step cards slide up staggered (120ms delay). Step 2: Once the parent card resolves, inner child UI nodes (messages, avatars, waveforms) translate and scale up (0.8 -> 1.0) staggered at 50ms intervals. On scroll up: Reverses animation, collapses micro-nodes first, then fades cards out.

connector_line.intent: Scroll-driven connector line draw: SVG path stroke-dashoffset counts down to 0 on scroll, drawing path from left to right or in circle. On scroll up: Path retracts.

step_media.intent: Media panel slide-in: Corresponding mockups slide in from screen margins (x: 40px -> 0px or -40px -> 0px) and fade in. On scroll up: Slides back out to margins.

step_card_hover.intent: Defines three hover interactions on Step Cards: 3D zoom preview, magnetic step numbers, and glowing border shimmer.

connector_pulse.intent: SVG path energy pulse: Hovering on a card runs a glowing shimmer wave along the connector path from current step to next step.

tab_click.intent: Tab click transition: Step 1: Old media slides out and fades (150ms). Step 2: New media slides in and scales up to 1.0 (150ms) producing a crossfade slide.

step_numbers_bg.intent: Oversized background index watermark (10rem): Step 1: Display faded (opacity: 6%). Step 2: Translate up by 10px on card hover.

in.description: Usually shares the background with features-grid (if consecutive) or switches to a clean white/light theme.

out.description: Divider wave or angled cut before entering showcase/testimonials.

flow.notes: Choose either how-it-works or features-grid; usually both are not needed. How-it-works fits process-driven products, while features-grid is better for listing general benefit vectors.
